## Summary

- Describe the feature or fix and impacted modules.

## Validation

- [ ] Unit tests executed
- [ ] Instrumentation/UI tests executed
- [ ] Release build validation executed (`:app:assembleRelease`)

## TDD Evidence (Required)

- [ ] Failing-test evidence links included (before implementation)
- [ ] Passing-test evidence links included (after implementation)
- [ ] Story evidence artifacts linked from `specs/001-scan-ndi-sources/validation/`

## Governance Checks

- [ ] No unauthorized permission additions
- [ ] Toolchain blocker status reviewed (`TOOLCHAIN-001` if applicable)
- [ ] Material 3 and lifecycle safety checks completed
